title: Greek Lamb Skewers
description: Grilled lamb skewers infused with smoky flavors, perfect for a summer evening. Serve with a side of tangy tzatziki sauce.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together smoky paprika, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
6. Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped parsley and lemon zest.
7. Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and lemon slices if desired.
